_comment: Template for config/ai_config.json. Copy this file to config/ai_config.json and edit for your machine. The real config is gitignored because it contains machine-specific paths and secrets. load_ai_config() falls back to built-in defaults if config/ai_config.json is missing. STT still uses faster-whisper; ORTH now defaults to the HF Transformers Razhan backend.
_ipa_comment: Tier 3 acoustic alignment: wav2vec2 is the ONLY IPA engine. The former text-based providers (local/epitran, openai, ollama) and the southern_kurdish_arabic_to_ipa fallback have been removed. The ipa block below is informational; the code path is hard-wired via ai.forced_align.Aligner to the model declared in the wav2vec2 block at the bottom of this file.

ortho._comment: Orthographic transcription (e.g. Kurdish Arabic script). backend='hf' is the default because HF Transformers FP32 on razhan/whisper-base-sdh eliminated the Saha01 CT2 contamination observed with faster-whisper/CTranslate2. First use may download about 280 MB into the normal HuggingFace cache under ~/.cache/huggingface/. To opt back into the legacy CT2 path, set backend='faster-whisper' and model_path to a local CTranslate2 directory. HF consumes the decode-level guard knobs below (condition_on_previous_text, compression_ratio_threshold, no_repeat_ngram_size, repetition_penalty, initial_prompt); compute_type/VAD remain legacy faster-whisper options and are logged as ignored by HF.
ortho.initial_prompt: کوڕ و کچ. مال و باخ. ئاو و خاک. هاتن و چوون. ئەم زمانە کوردیە.
